fields.description: .7z file is a compressed archive created with 7-Zip
.asc file (ASCII) is a plain-text format used to store structured data
.bin file is a "raw" binary format not human-readable stores data in 0s and 1s
.btl (Bottle Summary) is a specialized ASCII text file generated by Sea-Bird Scientific software
.cnv file is an ASCII text file generated by Sea-Bird Scientific SBE Data Processing software
.con file is a CTD configuration file defining instrument setup sensors and calibration parameters required to process raw CTD data
.csv (Comma-Separated Values) file is a plain-text format where each line is a record and each field is separated by a comma.
.dat file is a highly flexible "generic" format used for both raw and processed data
.docx (Microsoft Word document) is the modern standard for word processing documents
.gif (Graphics Interchange Format) file is primarily used for visual communication rather than data storage
.hbk file is a data file produced when a CTD is connected to a deck unit or acquisition system that logs data in “handshake/broadcast” mode.
.hdr file is a "header" file that contains metadata describing how to read an associated data file
.hex file is a text-based file (HEX format) used to store and transfer binary data
.hobo file is a proprietary data format used by Onset HOBO data loggers
.html (HyperText Markup Language) file is a format that anyone can open in a standard web browser
.igs file stores auxiliary navigation or input data most commonly ship position (GPS) that are synchronized with CTD data during acquisition
.jpg (or .jpeg) file is the standard for high-efficiency visual documentation
.json (JavaScript Object Notation) file is the modern standard for exchanging metadata and real-time sensor data over the web
.mdb file is a legacy database format created by Microsoft Access
.mdf file is most commonly refers to specialized binary formats for high-resolution sensor data
.mdf file is SQL Master Data File (Legacy Database Files)
.MP4 (MPEG-4 Part 14) is the most common digital multimedia container format used to store video and audio
.nc (NetCDF) file is a modern international standard for large multidimensional gridded data
.odf (Ocean Data Format) is a structured text-based format used by Fisheries and Oceans Canada (DFO)
.odt file is an OpenDocument Text file format used for word processing documents.
.pdf (Portable Document Format) is universal standard for digital documents designed to preserve formatting fonts and images
.png (Portable Network Graphics) file is gold standard for high-quality figures map overlays and digital icons
.ppt (Legacy) file is a digital slideshow created with Microsoft PowerPoint (97-2003)
.pptx (Modern) is the current standard (since 2007) digital slideshow created with Microsoft PowerPoint
.qat file is a text-based output generated by Sea-Bird Scientific’s data processing software.
.rar file is a compressed archive created with (rar to .r01–.r99 to .s01 and so on)
.ros file records real‑time CTD data associated with rosette operations especially Niskin bottle firing events
.rtf (Rich Text Format) file is a universal document file type
.sqlite or .db extension is a single self-contained database file that stores an entire relational database
.tar file (short for Tape Archive) is a collection of multiple files and folders bundled into a single file
.tiff (Tagged Image File Format) is a high-fidelity raster format used primarily for mapping satellite remote sensing and microscopic biological analysis
.tst file is for testing purposes
.txt file is the most basic digital document format available contains plain text only with no formatting
.vld file (associated with Minilog) is a data offload file used by VEMCO (now part of Innovasea) temperature and pressure data loggers
.xls (Microsoft Excel 97-2003) file is legacy binary format. It is rarely used today because it has a strict limit of 65536 rows
.xlsm (Microsoft Excel Macro-Enabled) file is Identical to .xlsx but allows for VBA Macros
.xlsx (Microsoft Excel Workbook) file is a modern standard based on XML It supports over 1 million rows
.xml (Extensible Markup Language) is a "metalanguage" designed to store and transport data in a format that is both human-readable and machine-readable
.psa file is a SeaSoft processing action file documenting CTD data processing steps and parameters
.sbebat file is a Sea‑Bird batch file controlling automated processing of multiple CTD datasets
.log file records messages warnings and errors generated during data acquisition or processing
.bl files are bottle log files created during rosette CTD casts
.xmlcon file is a XML‑formatted CTD configuration file defining instrument setup sensors and calibration parameters required to process raw CTD data
.ctd file is typically contains CTD profile data that are either Processed CTD data or Intermediate / reformatted CTD data
.m file is MATLAB script or function file used to process analyze or visualize CTD data
.Rmd file is R Markdown file  which combines text code and results into a single reproducible report
.db file is database file storing structured CTD‑related data or metadata used for data management and analysis
